# Fixture Notes

The sample files in `test/fixtures/sources/` are generated by
[`scripts/generate-test-fixtures.mjs`](/Users/taozeyu/codes/github.com/oomol/spinedigest-private/project/scripts/generate-test-fixtures.mjs).

Design goals:

- Original, non-copyrighted content
- Small enough for fast tests
- Rich enough to cover metadata, structure, punctuation, lists, code blocks, and multilingual text

Included fixtures:

- `sample-observatory-guide.epub`
- `sample-observatory-guide-mixed.epub`
- `sample-observatory-guide-encrypted.epub`
- `sample-observatory-guide.txt`
- `sample-observatory-guide.md`
